children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source and store in raw_data
children.behavior: Read from source based on type (csv/json/api), parse records, store in raw_data, log ingestion with counts

global_vars.description: Write parsed records to raw_data store

constraints.description: Must parse all records from source without data loss

acceptance_criteria.description: All records from source are stored in raw_data

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data and store in processed_data
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule from transform_config, skip malformed records with logging, store results in processed_data
children.signature: def TransformData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Write transformed records to processed_data store

constraints.description: Malformed records must be skipped and logged, not crash the pipeline

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid raw records are transformed and stored in processed_data

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules and mark invalid records
children.behavior: Read processed_data, compute quality_score for each record, mark invalid records, store updated processed_data, log validation

global_vars.description: Read and update processed_data with quality scores and validity flags

data_operations.description: Read records, update with quality_score and validity flags

constraints.description: Invalid records must be marked, not deleted

acceptance_criteria.description: All records in processed_data have quality_score and validity flags

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output and log export
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter only records that passed validation, format as csv or json per export_format, return as data list, log export
children.signature: def ExportData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: list) -> dict

constraints.description: Only valid records (quality_score >= threshold) should be exported

acceptance_criteria.description: Exported data contains only valid records in requested format

governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData (write) + TransformData (read); processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData (write) + ValidateData (read_write) + ExportData (read); pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all children (write). No parent operation dropped.
